title: Service and Repair Technician
description:
About SMOODER

Smooder is a proudly homegrown Singapore brand on a mission to make healthy living simple, fun, and accessible. Our innovative self-blend smoothie machines can be found in offices, hotels, and convenience stores across the island — and we’re just getting started.

As we expand beyond Singapore and begin introducing our machines to overseas markets, this is an exciting opportunity to join a passionate team at the heart of our growth. You’ll get the chance to interact with international customers and play a key role in supporting them through post-sales service — helping to bring a proudly Singapore brand to the world.

The Role

We are looking for a hands-on, resourceful Service & Repair Technician who thrives in a dynamic environment and takes pride in keeping machines running smoothly.

You will:

• Maintain & Service Machines – Perform routine servicing, cleaning, and health

checks to keep machines in top condition.

• Troubleshoot & Repair – Diagnose mechanical, electrical, and software issues,

carry out repairs, and minimise downtime.

• Install & Configure – Deliver, install, and set up machines at customer sites, ensuring seamless operation from day one.

• Customer Support – Provide prompt on-site support, respond to urgent calls, and train customer staff on proper usage.

This is a very hands-on role — perfect for someone who enjoys solving problems, takes initiative, and likes to see the direct impact of their work.

What We’re Looking For

• Experience: Minimum 5 years of hands-on repair or servicing experience, preferably with machines, F&B equipment, or appliances.

• Education: ITE or Diploma in Electronics, Electrical, or related field.

• Skills: Strong troubleshooting abilities, solid electronics/electrical/mechanical knowledge, and the ability to work independently.

• Mindset: Practical, solution-oriented, and a “get-it-done” attitude.

• Flexibility: Willing to work occasional weekends or overtime when urgent issues arise.

• Communication: Good command of English to communicate effectively with overseas customers.

• License: Possession of a valid Class 3 driving license is an advantage.

Workplace Details

Address: ONZE @ TANJONG PAGAR, Singapore 089218

Why Join Us?

• Exciting Growth Stage – Be part of a young company with plenty of action and focus over the next few months.

• Collaborative Team – Work directly with the founders and a small, passionate team where every contribution counts.

• Future Opportunities – Grow your skills as we grow the business — there’s lots of opportunity ahead.

Ready to grow with us? Send us your resume and tell us why you’d be a great fit. We can’t wait to meet you!

postedCompany.description:
Smooder is a Singapore-based food tech company transforming the way people enjoy healthy drinks. We specialize in smoothie innovation through four core business models: our self-blend Smooder machines (for offices, convenience stores), ready-to-drink cups for events and workplaces, frozen Smooder Packs for homes and cafés, and premium frozen fruit packs for F&B businesses.

As a proud recipient of the SME500 Singapore Award 2025, Smooder is committed to making wellness both accessible and sustainable. Our smoothies are designed to meet Nutri-Grade standards, offering healthier choices without compromising taste.

Smooder is expanding rapidly and building a vibrant, passionate team. Joining us means being part of a forward-looking company that blends food science, technology, and creativity to create impact in the wellness space.
postedCompany.name: SMOODER PRIVATE LIMITED
